Announcements

Stay updated with the latest news, updates, and important information from Lansing Area Track Club.

Urgent

Summer Registration Is Open

June 19, 2026

Registration is open for upcoming Lansing Area Track Club practices and events. Families can use the contact page to register an athlete or ask questions about age groups, practice locations, and next steps.

Update

Volunteers Needed for Community Events

June 14, 2026

We welcome volunteer coaches, meet helpers, sponsors, and community supporters. If you want to help youth athletics grow in Lansing, reach out through the contact page.

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
